tldr_zh: OpenAI發布部署模擬工具，Google推進AI規劃應用，Android 17正式推送，SpaceX估值突破2.6兆美元。
tldr_en: OpenAI releases Deployment Simulation for safer AI, Android 17 launches, SpaceX valuation hits $2.6T, US-Iran peace deal progresses.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出部署模擬技術，提前預測模型行為
items.title_en: OpenAI Introduces Deployment Simulation for Pre-Release Model Testing
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出部署模擬（Deployment Simulation）技術，使用真實對話數據在模型正式發布前預測其行為表現。該方法旨在改進安全評估和提高評估準確度，幫助開發者在部署前發現潛在問題。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation method to predict AI model behavior before release using real conversation data, improving safety evaluation and accuracy. This technique helps developers identify potential issues before full deployment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic暫停Claude Agent SDK代幣計費，避免用戶成本激增
items.title_en: Anthropic Pauses Token-Based Billing for Claude Agent SDK
items.summary_zh: Anthropic臨時暫停對Claude Agent SDK實施基於代幣的計費方案，該方案原定本週一生效，但會大幅增加重度用戶的成本。公司此舉是在考慮用戶反饋後的決定。
items.summary_en: Anthropic pauses token-based billing implementation for Claude Agent SDK that was planned for Monday, as it would significantly increase costs for power users. The company made this decision after considering user feedback.

items.title_zh: 美國政府要求Anthropic停止向國外提供Claude Fable 5
items.title_en: US Government Demands Anthropic Halt Claude Fable 5 Access for Foreign Users
items.summary_zh: 美國政府下令Anthropic停止對外國用戶提供Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5模型，原因是政府掌握存在對Fable 5進行越獄攻擊的方法。此舉引發科技社群反彈，超百名資安專家連署反對。
items.summary_en: US government orders Anthropic to halt international access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models due to knowledge of jailbreak methods. The move sparked backlash with over 100 cybersecurity experts signing a petition against the ban.

items.title_zh: Android 17正式推送至Pixel手機，新增氣泡應用視窗
items.title_en: Android 17 Rolls Out to Pixel Phones with New Bubble App Windows
items.summary_zh: Google正式向相容的Pixel手機推送Android 17系統更新，新增浮動「氣泡」應用視窗、螢幕反應錄影模式和摺疊機螢幕分割遊戲模式等功能。Wear OS 7也同步推送，帶來即時更新和更長電池續航時間。
items.summary_en: Google rolls out Android 17 to compatible Pixel phones with new floating Bubble app windows, Screen Reaction recording mode, and 50/50 split gaming mode for foldables. Wear OS 7 launches with Live Updates and improved battery life.

items.title_zh: Google推出Wear OS 7，支援即時更新和續航改善
items.title_en: Google Launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and Battery Improvements
items.summary_zh: Google正式推送Wear OS 7至Pixel Watch 2、3和4系列，引入即時更新功能，可同步運動比分和外送進度等實時資訊。新版本並改善了電池續航時間，為穿戴裝置帶來更好體驗。
items.summary_en: Google launches Wear OS 7 for Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4 with Live Updates feature that syncs sports scores and delivery tracking. The update improves battery life for smartwatches.

items.title_zh: SpaceX估值激增至2.6兆美元，短暫超越亞馬遜
items.title_en: SpaceX Valuation Soars to $2.6 Trillion, Briefly Surpasses Amazon
items.summary_zh: SpaceX股票上市交易以來估值激增超過1兆美元，達到2.6兆美元，一度超越亞馬遜成為市值最高企業。此次升值反映了市場對該公司火箭和衛星業務的強勢看好。
items.summary_en: SpaceX valuation balloons by over $1 trillion to $2.6 trillion since shares began trading, briefly surpassing Amazon as highest-valued company. The surge reflects strong market confidence in SpaceX's rocket and satellite operations.

items.title_zh: 高通發表Reality Elite晶片，推動下一代XR智慧眼鏡
items.title_en: Qualcomm Announces Snapdragon Reality Elite Chip for Next-Gen Smart Glasses
items.summary_zh: 高通在Augmented World Expo發表Snapdragon Reality Elite晶片，為下一代擴展實境（XR）裝置提供更強大的運算能力。該晶片是高通致力於讓智慧眼鏡成為手機替代品的戰略重要一環，目前已在測試裝置中驗證。
items.summary_en: Qualcomm announces Snapdragon Reality Elite chip for next-generation XR devices at Augmented World Expo, offering enhanced computing power. The chip is crucial to Qualcomm's strategy of positioning smart glasses as smartphone replacements.

items.title_zh: Google與Xreal合作Aura XR眼鏡開放預訂
items.title_en: Google and Xreal Aura XR Glasses Now Available for Preorder
items.summary_zh: Google與Xreal合作的Project Aura智慧眼鏡正式開放預訂，預訂費為99美元。該款第二代Android XR裝置預計在秋季於美國、英國、日本、加拿大和南韓上市，代表消費級XR硬體的重要發展。
items.summary_en: Google and Xreal's Aura XR glasses open for preorder at $99 deposit. The second Android XR device is expected to launch this fall in US, UK, Japan, Canada, and South Korea, marking significant progress in consumer XR hardware.

items.title_zh: 新加坡啟用Aspire 2B超級電腦，搭載1,500顆H200 GPU
items.title_en: Singapore Launches Aspire 2B AI Supercomputer with 1,500 H200 GPUs
items.summary_zh: 新加坡國家超級電腦中心宣布新一代超級電腦Aspire 2B正式投入運作，搭載逾1,500顆NVIDIA H200 GPU，峰值運算力達115PF。該系統專為大模型訓練和推論優化，將支援國家級AI、氣候模擬和科學研究應用。
items.summary_en: Singapore launches new Aspire 2B supercomputer with over 1,500 Nvidia H200 GPUs achieving 115PF peak performance. The system is optimized for large language model training and inference, supporting national AI, climate simulation, and scientific research applications.

items.title_zh: 美伊中東和平協議確定19日簽署，終結區域戰爭
items.title_en: US-Iran Middle East Peace Agreement Scheduled for June 19 Signing
items.summary_zh: 瑞士外交部證實美國與伊朗達成的終結中東戰爭協議將於6月19日在瑞士布爾根施托克度假村簽署。根據協議，美國將允許伊朗立即恢復石油出售，荷莫茲海峽將重新開放。
items.summary_en: Swiss Foreign Ministry confirms US-Iran peace agreement ending Middle East conflicts will be signed on June 19 at Burgenstock Resort. Under the deal, US will allow Iran to immediately resume oil sales and the Strait of Hormuz will reopen.

items.title_zh: NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳：AI時代需要新的社會規範
items.title_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang: AI Era Requires 'New Social Norms'
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳在德州工廠擴建典禮時表示，隨著AI時代到來，社會需要建立新的規範和倫理標準。他強調了負責任AI發展的重要性，以及企業在塑造AI應用方式中的責任。
items.summary_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang states society needs new social norms and standards in the age of AI during a Texas facility groundbreaking. He emphasizes the importance of responsible AI development and corporate responsibility in shaping how AI is deployed.
